title: Competition for Survival and the Maximum Entropy Production Principle in Self-Organized Silver Particle Chains
summary: The maximum entropy production (MEP) principle is a hypothetical law of physics which dictates that complex systems, far from equilibrium, evolve into an ordered dissipative structure (DS) which generates as much entropy per second as possible. An important problem is whether the natural competition for resources, limits the ability of DS to achieve the maximum of the entropy production rate (EPR). We investigate this competition between DS by performing high precision electrical measurements on suspensions of silver particles under electric fields. To establish the impact of competition on MEP principle, precise electrical measurements are performed on two Ag suspension samples connected in parallel. The samples are able to self-organize, dissipate energy, generate entropy, and compete with each other for resources, i.e., electrical current. Our findings are as follows: (1) There is a competition between the two samples, which prevents both systems from achieving their maximum possible contribution to the global entropy production rate. (2) Due to this competition, we find that only one out of two samples can self-organize, while the other deteriorates and approaches zero EPR. (3) The global EPR, i.e., the entropy produced by the samples and the energy supply circuit, is also reduced from its possible maximum due to the competition between the sub-systems. Based on these observations, we propose that the competition effect constitutes an essential constraint that must be incorporated into formulations of the MEP. This principle parallels real-world phenomena, reflecting the competition for resources observed among species and individual organisms in natural systems. We also examine the global implications of the MEP and propose that it serves as a driving mechanism propelling the hypothetical ascent of civilizations along the Kardashev scale.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验证明，在最大熵产生原理中，子系统间的资源竞争会抑制整体熵产率，仅有单一系统能自组织达到高熵产，而另一系统退化至零熵产。竞争效应应被纳入MEP原理的公式化表达中。
AI.motivation: 探究复杂非平衡系统中，子系统间对资源的自然竞争是否以及如何限制它们实现最大熵产率的能力。
AI.method: 对两个并联的银悬浮液样品进行高精度电学测量，使样品在电场中自组织、耗散能量、产生熵，并相互竞争电流资源。
AI.result: (1) 竞争阻止两个系统都达到最大熵产率；(2) 竞争中只有一个样品能自组织，另一个退化至接近零熵产率；(3) 全局熵产率也因竞争而低于理论最大值。
AI.conclusion: 竞争效应是MEP原理的关键约束条件；MEP可作为文明沿卡尔达舍夫尺度演化的驱动机制。

title: A method for calculating entropy production without knowing transition rates or dwell times
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to Physica A
summary: The entropy production rate is central to the study of non-equilibrium systems. This parameter is closely connected to violation of time-reversal symmetry, energy consumption, efficiency, and other properties of interest; in short, it quantifies how far a system is from thermodynamic equilibrium. Standard formulas for the entropy production require knowledge of the system's underlying dynamics, but this knowledge may be hard to acquire in practice. Here, I present a method for inferring the entropy production rate of a Markovian system from the sequence of states that the system occupies on a single long trajectory or many shorter trajectories, and the total time of the trajectory or trajectories. The method does not require knowledge of the dwell times in the various states, the times at which transitions occur, or of the transition rates characterizing the Markov process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅从状态序列中推断马尔可夫系统熵产生率的方法，无需知道驻留时间、跃迁时间或跃迁速率。
AI.motivation: 熵产生率是非平衡系统的核心参数，但标准公式需要知道系统底层动力学，这在实践中难以获取。
AI.method: 从单条长轨迹或多条短轨迹的状态序列中推断熵产生率，无需驻留时间、跃迁时间或跃迁速率等详细信息。
AI.result: 该方法仅利用状态序列和时间信息即可推断熵产生率。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种更实用的熵产生率推断方法，降低了对系统动力学知识的依赖。

title: Finite-size occupancy scaling of apparent fractal dimensions in stochastic trajectories
comment: Main text: 30 pages, 5 figures; supplementary material included
summary: Estimating a fractal dimension from a finite stochastic trajectory is a finite-size scaling problem: the apparent box-counting exponent is shaped by an occupancy crossover between the resolved range of scales and the finite number of sampled points, and need not equal the dimension of the limiting process. We model this crossover with a balls-in-boxes occupancy law, which predicts the box-count curve, the finite-size saturation scale, and a scaling function for the normalized local slope. Across random-walk traces, fractional Brownian graphs, and Levy flights, the normalized local slope collapses onto a single crossover curve, while the windowed box-counting bias collapses when the regression window is positioned relative to the saturation scale. Inverting the occupancy model gives a finite-size bias correction that reduces error on controlled stochastic trajectories and transfers across held-out model classes. Comparisons with correlation dimension, detrended fluctuation analysis, the variogram, and Higuchi's method show that the dominant bias is specific to point-sampled box-counting over finite scale windows, and that local-slope stability alone is not a reliable diagnostic. A DNA-walk example illustrates the workflow on measured data, and all figures, tables, and in-text numbers are regenerated from released single-seed code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于"球与盒"占用模型的有限尺寸偏差校正方法，用于从有限随机轨迹中更准确地估计分形维数，并通过多种随机过程和实际DNA数据验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 从有限随机轨迹估计分形维数存在有限尺寸缩放问题——表观盒计数指数受到采样点数有限的占用交叉效应影响，并不等于极限过程的分形维数。现有方法缺乏对这一偏差的系统建模和校正。
AI.method: 用"球与盒"占用模型建模有限采样点导致的盒计数曲线交叉行为，预测盒计数曲线、有限尺寸饱和尺度以及归一化局部斜率的标度函数。通过将该模型反转，得到有限尺寸偏差校正公式。
AI.result: 在随机游走、分数布朗运动、莱维飞行等轨迹上，归一化局部斜率塌缩到单一交叉曲线；窗口化盒计数偏差在回归窗口相对于饱和尺度定位时也发生塌缩。偏差校正显著减小了受控随机轨迹上的误差，并能跨模型类迁移。与相关维数、DFA、变异函数、Higuchi方法对比，表明点采样盒计数在有限尺度窗口上存在独特的主导偏差，局部斜率稳定性并不可靠。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的占用模型校正方法有效纠正了点采样盒计数法的有限尺寸偏差，并通过DNA行走实例展示了实际应用流程。

title: Barrier crossing in a two-state system: Effect of bias and stochastic fields
summary: We study barrier crossing in a two-state system, namely the kinetic Ising model, in the presence of a weak bias field and spatially homogeneous, but time-dependent, Gaussian random fields. We find that the bias field determines the location of the dominant maxima of the probability distribution function of the magnetization, whereas the noise intensity controls their sharpness and stability of the distribution. A moderate stochastic field lowers the effective energy barrier and facilitates transitions between ordered states, while strong noise induces broad distributions and significant backflow, which reduces directional selectivity. Our results suggest that efficient barrier crossing requires a balanced combination of moderate stochastic driving and controlled bias.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动力学Ising模型中，弱偏置场和时变高斯随机场对两态系统势垒穿越的影响。发现偏置场决定磁化概率分布的主峰位置，噪声强度控制峰的锐度和分布稳定性。适度随机场降低有效能垒并促进有序态转变，强噪声导致宽分布和显著回流的降低方向选择性。高效势垒穿越需平衡随机驱动和偏置控制。
AI.motivation: 理解弱偏置场和时变随机噪声如何共同影响两态系统中的势垒穿越行为，探索高效穿越的条件。
AI.method: 以动力学Ising模型为研究对象，引入弱偏置场和空间均匀但时间依赖的高斯随机场，通过分析磁化概率分布函数的特征来研究势垒穿越。
AI.result: 偏置场决定概率分布主峰位置；噪声强度控制峰的锐度和稳定性；适度随机场降低有效能垒、促进有序态转变；强噪声导致宽分布和显著回流，降低方向选择性。
AI.conclusion: 高效势垒穿越需要适度随机驱动与可控偏置的平衡组合。

title: Three-component superconductivity: the effect of second-order Josephson couplings
summary: Recently, a three-component Ginzburg-Landau (GL) model compatible with the 3Q pair-density-wave state has been proposed to explain the fractional quantum magnetic resistance oscillations of period $φ_0/3 = hc/6e$ observed in vanadium-based kagome superconductors. The physics of this model is governed by second-order Josephson-type couplings, which break both time-reversal symmetry and discrete $π$-phase flip symmetry. In this work, we theoretically derive the complete set of ground-state solutions and construct a comprehensive phase diagram in the GL parameter space, characterized by analytically determined phase boundaries. We identify five distinct ground states: an 8-fold degenerate frustrated state and four 4-fold degenerate non-frustrated phase-locked states. Four of these states spontaneously break time-reversal symmetry. Numerical analysis of the collective modes reveals the emergence of a Higgs-Leggett mode unique to the frustrated region, accompanied by mode softening near the phase boundaries. Our findings provide a comprehensive theoretical framework for understanding the multifaceted physics of multicomponent superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了三组分Ginzburg-Landau模型描述3Q对密度波态的完整基态解和相图，发现五种基态，其中四种自发破缺时间反演对称性，并在 frustrated 区域发现独特的Higgs-Leggett集体模。
AI.motivation: 解释在钒基kagome超导体中观察到的分数量子磁阻振荡周期φ₀/3 = hc/6e这一实验现象，为三组分超导体的多物理性质提供理论框架。
AI.method: 理论推导三组分GL模型的基态解，通过解析确定的相边界构建完整相图；数值分析集体模。
AI.result: 发现五种基态：一个8重简并frustrated态和四个4重简并非frustrated锁相态；其中四种自发破缺时间反演对称性；在frustrated区域发现独特的Higgs-Leggett模，并在相边界附近出现模软化。
AI.conclusion: 为理解多组分超导体的丰富物理提供了全面的理论框架。

title: Full Quantum and Mixed Quantum--Classical Dynamics of Hot Exciton Cooling in Semiconductor Nanocrystals
summary: Hot-exciton relaxation in semiconductor nanocrystals (NCs) is often described using perturbative theories, but their accuracy is difficult to assess for realistic exciton--phonon Hamiltonians. Here, we benchmark the perturbative quantum master equation (QME) and several mixed quantum--classical (MQC) methods against fully quantum mechanical dynamics. Using atomistically parameterized models for CdSe core and CdSe/CdS core--shell NCs, we find that bare CdSe exhibits an ultrafast initial decay followed by slower cooling, whereas the core--shell system is dominated by the slower component. Analysis of reduced models shows that the ultrafast component arises from rapid diabatic state mixing driven by thermal fluctuations of low-frequency phonons, rather than from nuclear-assisted energy relaxation. The QME captures the initial fast decay but can fail for the slower relaxation in the diabatic representation, while the mapping approach to surface hopping (MASH) gives the most consistent agreement with both benchmark dynamics and equilibrium populations. These results establish a benchmark for exciton-cooling dynamics in NCs and clarify the physical regimes in which widely used approximate methods are reliable.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比微扰量子主方程(QME)和多种混合量子-经典(MQC)方法与全量子力学动力学，对半导体纳米晶中热激子弛豫进行了基准测试。研究发现CdSe核表现出超快初始衰减后缓慢冷却，而核壳系统以慢成分为主导；超快成分源于低频声子热涨落驱动的非绝热态混合，而非核辅助能量弛豫。QME能捕捉初始快衰减但在慢弛豫上可能失效，MASH方法效果最佳。
AI.motivation: 现有描述半导体纳米晶中热激子弛豫的微扰理论准确性难以评估，尤其是在真实的激子-声子哈密顿量框架下，缺乏可靠的基准测试结果。
AI.method: 采用原子级参数化的CdSe核和CdSe/CdS核壳纳米晶模型，比较微扰QME、多种MQC方法与全量子力学动力学计算结果；并通过简化模型分析超快弛豫成分的物理机制。
AI.result: CdSe核表现超快初始衰减后跟缓慢冷却，核壳系统慢成分主导；超快成分源于低频声子热涨落引起的非绝热态混合；QME能捕捉快衰减但慢弛豫失效；MASH方法与基准动力学和平衡布居的一致性最好。
AI.conclusion: 建立了纳米晶中激子冷却动力学的基准，阐明了常用近似方法在不同物理条件下的可靠性，其中MASH方法是最优的近似方法。

title: Application of Reinforcement Learning for Multigroup Energy Grid Optimization for Neutron Transport Criticality Problems
summary: The optimization of energy group structures is integral to ensure the accuracy of multigroup neutron transport calculations. This works introduces the use of reinforcement learning (RL) with surrogate modeling to optimize the group structure for one-dimensional spherical k-criticality problems. The proximal policy optimization (PPO) RL algorithm is modified to be used with energy grid structures, rewarding accurate group structures while favoring fewer energy groups. This method starts from a high-fidelity energy grid and remove energy bounds until reaching a target energy structure. The RL agent identify which bounds are important for the final group structure, which prevent it being stuck in local minima without limiting the initial group structure. Neural network surrogate models that incorporate energy, material, and spatial information are used for evaluating energy grid structures without requiring full transport simulations. This alleviates the computational constraint commonly used in other group structure optimization problems in addition to accelerating the RL training process. Applied to Godiva and BeRP ball problems, the RL constructed group structures outperform commonly used group structures. The RL group structure optimization method is also shown to perform similar to the hierarchical agglomeration approach but offers more flexibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用强化学习（PPO算法）结合代理模型，自动优化一维球形k临界问题的能群结构，在Godiva和BeRP球问题上表现优于传统能群结构。
AI.motivation: 能群结构优化对多群中子输运计算的精度至关重要，传统方法计算成本高且易陷入局部最优，需要更高效的自动化优化方法。
AI.method: 采用改进的PPO强化学习算法，从高保真能量网格出发逐步剔除能量边界；使用整合了能量、材料与空间信息的神经网络代理模型替代全输运模拟，大幅降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在Godiva和BeRP球问题中，RL优化的能群结构优于传统常用能群结构，性能与层次凝聚方法相当但灵活性更强。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习结合代理模型能有效优化能群结构，在保证精度的同时减少能群数量，为多群中子输运计算提供更灵活高效的方案。

title: Dirac-Line Criticality and Emergent Horizons in Weyl Lifshitz Transitions
summary: Type-II Weyl fermions may emerge behind the event horizon of black holes. We employ the Painlevé-Gullstrand metric to study the surface of the Lifshitz transition at the horizon, equivalent to the interface separating the type-I and type-II Weyl states. We find several analogies between the black hole horizon and the transformation of type-I to type-II Weyl fermions through the Dirac line. We analyze the symmetry-protected topological order at the Lifshitz transition originating in semimetals. The emergence of Hawking radiation in Weyl semimetals is discussed. We show that the transition state from type-I to type-II Dirac fermions can be viewed as a black-hole horizon, which exhibits unique characteristics, including a Dirac-line Fermi surface with a nontrivial topological invariant and a critical chiral anomaly effect.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了黑洞事件视界与Weyl半金属中从第一类到第二类Weyl费米子相变之间的类比，发现Lifshitz相变表面类似于黑洞视界，并讨论了对称保护拓扑序和霍金辐射现象。
AI.motivation: 探索黑洞物理与凝聚态物质中Weyl费米子之间的深层联系，特别是利用Painlevé-Gullstrand度规研究黑洞视界与Weyl半金属中Lifshitz相变界面的类比关系。
AI.method: 采用Painlevé-Gullstrand度规分析黑洞视界处的Lifshitz相变表面，将其等效为第一类与第二类Weyl态之间的界面，并通过Dirac线研究两类费米子的转变过程。
AI.result: 发现黑洞视界与Weyl费米子类型转变之间存在多个类比；确定了Lifshitz相变处的对称保护拓扑序；揭示了从第一类到第二类Dirac费米子的过渡态可视为黑洞视界，具有Dirac线费米面、非平凡拓扑不变量和临界手征反常效应。
AI.conclusion: 第一类到第二类Weyl/Dirac费米子的过渡态可类比为黑洞事件视界，为在半金属体系中研究霍金辐射等黑洞物理现象提供了新的理论框架。

title: Quantum criticality of the ferromagnetic Dicke-Ising model
summary: We describe the quantum phase transitions in the ferromagnetic Dicke-Ising model using a Landau theory approach. The theory quantitatively captures the change from a second- to a first-order transition between the normal and superradiant phases through a tricritical point. We identify virtual correlated nearest-neighbor double spin-flip processes as the crucial mechanism responsible for this behavior. The tricritical point constitutes a quantum phase transition above the upper critical dimension. We discuss the modifications to finite-size scaling required for the correct interpretation of numerical data at the tricritical point. Our results emphasize the need for adapted finite-size scaling forms in all-to-all interacting quantum systems and establish the ferromagnetic Dicke-Ising model as a paradigmatic platform for quantum phase transitions above the upper critical dimension, encompassing both standard $φ^4$ criticality and beyond.

AI.tldr: 本文利用朗道理论研究了铁磁Dicke-Ising模型中的量子相变，定量描述了从二阶到一阶相变的转变，并通过三临界点识别了虚拟关联最近邻双自旋翻转过程作为关键机制。研究讨论了高于上临界维度的相变行为，并提出了改进的有限尺寸标度方法。
AI.motivation: 理解铁磁Dicke-Ising模型中量子相变从二阶到一阶的转变机制，揭示高于上临界维度的相变行为，并为全连接量子系统建立正确的有限尺寸标度方法。
AI.method: 采用朗道理论方法，结合虚拟关联最近邻双自旋翻转过程的分析，以及改进的有限尺寸标度理论。
AI.result: 定量捕捉了正常相到超辐射相从二阶到一阶相变的转变过程，识别了三临界点，发现其属于高于上临界维度的量子相变。
AI.conclusion: 全连接量子系统需要适配的有限尺寸标度形式，铁磁Dicke-Ising模型可作为研究高于上临界维度量子相变的典范平台。

title: High-temperature instability of artificial cuprorivaite: a study using thermal analysis, X-ray powder diffractometry and polarized light microscopy
summary:
CaCuSi$_4$O$_{10}$ powder was studied by differential scanning calorimetry and thermogravimetry methods in the range from room temperature to 1450$\,^{\circ}$C at heating and cooling rates of 20$\,^{\circ}$C/min.
  The process of decomposition of cuprorivaite, the composition and transformations of its decomposition products during successive heat treatments were also studied by powder X-ray diffraction and polarization optical microscopy techniques.
  It was found that CaCuSi$_4$O$_{10}$ starts to decompose by incongruent melting at a temperature of about 1020$\,^{\circ}$C, with the minimum of the endothermic DSC peak associated with this process being at 1064.4$\,^{\circ}$C.
  CaCuSi$_4$O$_{10}$ decomposes irreversibly and subsequent cyclic annealings up to a temperature of 1450$\,^{\circ}$C at heating and cooling rates of 20$\,^{\circ}$C/min do not cause its re-synthesis.
  CaCuSi$_4$O$_{10}$ transforms into a two-phase system consisting of acicular crystals of monoclinic tridymite fused with green glass with the composition CuO$\,-\,$Cu$_2$O$\,-\,$CaO$\,-\,$SiO$_2$, with the weight ratio of tridymite to glass being about $12:13$, as a result of two successive annealings up to the temperature of 1450$\,^{\circ}$C.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过DSC/TG、XRD和偏振光显微镜等手段，系统解析了CaCuSi₄O₁₀（硅孔雀石）在室温至1450°C范围内的热分解行为。发现其在约1020°C开始发生不一致熔融分解（DSC峰最低点1064.4°C），分解不可逆，后续循环退火无法重新合成。最终产物为单斜鳞石英针状晶体与CuO-Cu₂O-CaO-SiO₂绿色玻璃构成的两相体系，鳞石英与玻璃质量比约为12:13。
AI.motivation: Cuprorivaite（CaCuSi₄O₁₀）是一种重要的古代蓝色颜料（埃及蓝），其热稳定性与分解机制对文物保护、材料合成及高温陶瓷工艺具有重要科学意义。然而，关于其高温分解路径、产物组成及相变可逆性缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 采用差示扫描量热法（DSC）和热重分析（TG）在室温至1450°C、20°C/min升降温速率下表征热行为；结合粉末X射线衍射（XRD）和偏振光显微镜分析分解产物的物相组成与微观形貌；通过循环退火实验验证分解可逆性。
AI.result: (1) CaCuSi₄O₁₀在约1020°C开始不一致熔融分解，DSC吸热峰最低点位于1064.4°C；(2) 分解不可逆，后续20°C/min循环退火至1450°C无法实现再合成；(3) 经两次1450°C退火后，完全转化为单斜鳞石英（针状晶体）与绿色玻璃（CuO-Cu₂O-CaO-SiO₂体系）的两相混合物，鳞石英与玻璃质量比约12:13。
AI.conclusion: CaCuSi₄O₁₀的高温分解机制为不一致熔融，产物为鳞石英+多组分玻璃的不可逆两相体系。该结果澄清了埃及蓝的热稳定性上限（约1020°C），对古代颜料保护及硅酸盐高温化学具有重要参考价值。

title: The Resetting Heat Engine: A Thermodynamic Cycle of Thermal Expansion and Compression
summary: We consider a Brownian particle confined by an external potential and subject to stochastic resetting to the origin. Motivated by the repetitive nature of the dynamics, we describe the process as a thermodynamic cycle of thermal expansion and collapse, analyzed via a framework based on the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between forward and reversed trajectory ensembles. While the entropy production generally depends on the full trajectory ensemble and cannot be reduced to thermodynamic state variables alone, we show that the harmonic potential constitute a special case, where the entropy production reduces exactly to a state-function-like expression determined solely by the distributions before and after resetting. Explicit analytical results are derived for periodic and Poissonian resetting. At low resetting rates $r$, the entropy production rate grows linearly with $r$ and is proportional to the symmetric KL divergence between the reset and equilibrium distributions. At very high rates, the resetting process becomes effectively perpetual and the entropy production vanishes. Langevin simulations for an anharmonic quartic potential display the same generic behavior, indicating that these features are not restricted to harmonic confinement. Our results establish a direct connection between stochastic resetting, thermodynamic cycles, and information-theoretic measures of irreversibility.

AI.tldr: 本文研究受随机复位影响的布朗粒子，将其描述为热膨胀与压缩的热力学循环，利用KL散度分析熵产生。发现简谐势下熵产生简化为状态函数表达式，低复位率时熵产生率与复位率线性相关，高复位率时熵产生消失。非简谐势也表现出类似行为。
AI.motivation: 受随机复位动力学重复性本质的启发，希望将复位过程视为热力学循环，建立随机复位、热力学循环与不可逆性信息论度量之间的直接联系。
AI.method: 将随机复位过程描述为热膨胀与收缩的热力学循环，基于正向与反向轨迹系综间的KL散度进行分析。对简谐势推导解析结果，对非简谐势进行Langevin模拟验证。
AI.result: 简谐势下熵产生简化为仅由复位前后分布决定的状态函数表达式；低复位率时熵产生率与r线性相关，正比于复位分布与平衡分布间的对称KL散度；高复位率时熵产生消失；非简谐势也表现出相同行为。
AI.conclusion: 建立了随机复位、热力学循环与信息论不可逆性度量之间的直接联系，揭示该行为具有普适性，不限于简谐势约束。

title: Absolute measurement of penetration depth of superconducting thin films using microwave stripline resonators
summary: Superconducting microstrip resonators, which leverage kinetic inductance to probe electrodynamics, are sensitive tools for studying superconducting thin films at microwave frequencies. However, extracting the absolute superconducting penetration depth from these measurements remains challenging. In this work, we present a hybrid method to determine the absolute value of penetration depth over a wide temperature range by combining resonator measurements with finite-element electromagnetic simulations in COMSOL Multiphysics. We demonstrate this approach by extracting the penetration depth of NbN films by fabricating resonators from films of various thicknesses. Furthermore, we extend the technique to materials with lower critical temperatures by employing a flip-film geometry. By placing a sample above a NbN resonator, separated by a thin Mylar dielectric, we create a coupled structure where changes in the sample's penetration depth shift the resonant frequency. This non-destructive method provides a reliable, high-sensitivity platform for characterizing the penetration depth of diverse superconducting thin films.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合方法，结合超导微带谐振器测量与COMSOL有限元电磁仿真，来提取超导薄膜的绝对穿透深度，并通过NbN薄膜和翻转薄膜结构验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 超导微带谐振器虽可探测薄膜的电动力学特性，但从中提取绝对穿透深度值一直存在困难，亟需可靠的方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 结合谐振器测量与COMSOL Multiphysics有限元电磁仿真，并通过翻转薄膜几何结构（将样品置于NbN谐振器上方，中间隔以薄Mylar介质）扩展至低临界温度材料。
AI.result: 成功提取了不同厚度NbN薄膜的穿透深度，并展示了该方法对低Tc材料的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种可靠、高灵敏度、非破坏性的平台，可用于表征多种超导薄膜的穿透深度。

title: Approximate Label Symmetries Improve Data Scaling
summary: Enforcing universal symmetries in machine learning (ML) models is a common strategy to mitigate data scarcity. We show that exploiting exact, as well as approximate, label symmetries can benefit scaling laws. We illustrate the idea for the s, p, d orbital densities of the electron in the hydrogen atom, for the three vibrational normal modes of the water molecule, as well as its full 3D potential energy hypersurface. Resulting ML models of electron density and potential energies exhibit superior learning curves, demonstrating improved generalization efficiency. When label symmetries are not exact, the same principles govern the observed learning behavior -- up to the convergence floors set by the degree to which the symmetry is approximate. For convex wells in the molecular potential energy surface, a Hessian-based correction suppresses the leading symmetry-breaking error in augmented labels.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在机器学习模型中利用精确和近似的标签对称性可以改善缩放定律，通过氢原子电子密度、水分子振动模式及势能面的案例，展示了更好的泛化效率和学习曲线，并针对非精确对称性提出了基于Hessian的修正方法。
AI.motivation: 在数据稀缺的情况下，强制通用对称性是缓解策略之一，但作者想进一步探索利用精确和近似标签对称性对缩放定律的益处，以提升模型泛化效率。
AI.method: 在氢原子电子轨道密度、水分子振动模式及三维势能面上构建ML模型，利用标签对称性（包括近似对称）进行学习，并对凸势阱引入Hessian修正以抑制对称性破缺误差。
AI.result: 利用标签对称性的模型展现出更优的学习曲线和泛化效率；近似对称情况下，学习行为遵循相同原理，但存在由近似程度决定的收敛下限；Hessian修正有效抑制了主要对称性破缺误差。
AI.conclusion: 标签对称性（无论是精确还是近似）都能显著改善ML模型的缩放行为，为应对数据稀缺提供了更通用的策略，近似对称情形需关注其收敛极限。

title: Surface Contact Approximation for Magneto-Thermal Finite Element Analysis of No-Insulation HTS Coils
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: High-temperature superconducting (HTS) coated conductors (CCs) can be wound into no-insulation (NI) coils, in which electrical current can partially bypass local normal zones via turn-to-turn contact layers (T2TCLs). Accurate magneto-thermal simulation of such coils, therefore, requires an efficient representation of the electrical and thermal behavior of the T2TCLs. This paper introduces a magneto-thermal surface contact approximation (SCA) for finite element analysis of NI HTS coils. The formulation is derived as a special case of the more general thin shell approximation (TSA) by introducing suitable approximations such as negligible tangential surface currents and eddy-current effects inside the T2TCL. The resulting SCA formulation replaces the thin volumetric contact layer with a dedicated surface weak formulation based on the electric contact resistance and thermal contact conductance. In contrast, the TSA formulation requires the definition of electric resistivities and thermal conductivities as well as the thickness of the T2TCL. The SCA is implemented in the Pancake3D module of the free and open-source Finite Element Quench Simulator. It is verified through transient magneto-thermal simulations of a model NI pancake coil. Numerical results are compared against the established TSA formulation. The results show that the SCA accurately reproduces the relevant electromagnetic and thermal behavior. For the TSA, there is a trade-off between choosing large (potentially unphysical) thicknesses with low resistivities leading to inaccurate results, or small thicknesses with large resistivities making the linear system harder to solve, increasing the computational effort. In contrast, the SCA, thanks to using contact resistances and conductances directly without the necessity to define a thickness, is easy to use and robust.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种磁热表面接触近似（SCA）方法，用于无绝缘高温超导线圈的有限元分析，相比传统的薄壳近似（TSA），SCA通过直接使用接触电阻和热导率，无需定义厚度，提高了数值模拟的鲁棒性和易用性。
AI.motivation: 无绝缘高温超导线圈中，匝间接触层（T2TCL）的电热行为对精确的磁热仿真至关重要，而传统薄壳近似（TSA）在厚度和电阻率的选取上存在权衡（厚度过大导致结果不准确，厚度过小增加计算负担），因此需要一种更高效、稳健的建模方法。
AI.method: 将SCA作为TSA的特殊情况进行推导，通过忽略T2TCL内的切向表面电流和涡流效应，用基于接触电阻和接触热导的表面弱形式替换体积接触层。SCA在开源有限元淬火模拟器Pancake3D模块中实现。
AI.result: 通过模型NI pancake线圈的瞬态磁热仿真验证，SCA能够准确再现相关的电磁和热行为。相比TSA，SCA无需定义厚度，避免了TSA在厚度和电阻率选择上的权衡问题，更易用且鲁棒性更强。
AI.conclusion: SCA是一种高效、稳健且易于使用的替代方法，适用于无绝缘高温超导线圈的磁热仿真，能够克服TSA在参数选择上的困难。

title: Emergence of an antiferromagnetic topological Anderson insulator in the interacting Haldane model
summary: We examine the emergence of topological Anderson insulating phases in the spinful Haldane model with Hubbard and next-neighbor density-density interactions, subject to Anderson disorder. Using finite-size exact diagonalization, we characterize the phases that arise from the interplay between topology, interactions, and disorder. In addition to standard $C=2$ topological Anderson phases, we observe an antiferromagnetic $C=1$ topological Anderson phase, consistent with the antiferromagnetic quantum anomalous Hall insulator previously identified in the clean model at finite staggered mass. We further analyze these phases using a neural network trained on the exact diagonalization data. Our results support the hypothesis that an explicit charge imbalance is required to induce the $C=1$ phase, generated by Anderson disorder rather than by a staggered mass.

AI.tldr: 本文在考虑自旋的Haldane模型中引入Hubbard相互作用和次近邻密度-密度相互作用，并加入安德森无序。通过有限尺寸精确对角化，研究了拓扑、相互作用和无序之间的相互作用产生的相。除了标准的C=2拓扑安德森相外，还观察到反铁磁C=1拓扑安德森相，这对应于清洁模型中有限交错质量下已识别的反铁磁量子反常霍尔绝缘体。进一步使用神经网络对精确对角化数据进行分析。结果支持一个假设：需要显式的电荷不平衡来诱导C=1相，而这种电荷不平衡是由安德森无序而非交错质量产生的。
AI.motivation: 探索拓扑、相互作用和无序三者之间的相互作用，研究在自旋Haldane模型中，安德森无序能否诱导出新的拓扑安德森绝缘体相，特别是反铁磁C=1相。
AI.method: 采用有限尺寸精确对角化方法，并辅以神经网络对精确对角化数据进行分析。
AI.result: 除了标准的C=2拓扑安德森相外，还发现了反铁磁C=1拓扑安德森相。该C=1相需要显式的电荷不平衡来诱导，而安德森无序可以像交错质量一样提供这种电荷不平衡。
AI.conclusion: 安德森无序可以替代交错质量，通过诱导电荷不平衡来实现反铁磁C=1拓扑安德森绝缘体相，丰富了拓扑安德森相的种类。

title: Inelastic Neutron Scattering of the layered Kitaev ferromagnet Li$_3$Co$_2$SbO$_6$
summary: Cobalt-based quantum magnets forming layered honeycomb arrangements have attracted much attention recently, as they are considered as a potential platform for materials with exotic Kitaev spin exchange. Amongst the discussed candidate materials are Na$_3$Co$_2$SbO$_6$ and Na$_2$Co$_2$TeO$_6$, both possessing a low-temperature ground state with magnetic zigzag ordering, similar to Na$_2$IrO$_3$ and $α$-RuCl$_3$. Here we report inelastic neutron scattering experiments on the quantum magnet Li$_3$Co$_2$SbO$_6$, which features ferromagnetic honeycomb planes with opposite magnetizations in neighboring planes. By comparing with linear spin wave theory, we show that the magnetic properties of Li$_3$Co$_2$SbO$_6$ can be well-modelled by an extended Kitaev--Heisenberg model, establishing it as a Kitaev-ferromagnet, or more specifically, as a Kitaev A-type antiferromagnet. Our analysis is complemented by magnetic field measurements and simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过非弹性中子散射实验研究了Li₃Co₂SbO₆量子磁体的磁性，并结合扩展Kitaev-Heisenberg模型分析，证明其为Kitaev铁磁体（具体为Kitaev A型反铁磁体），同时通过磁场测量和模拟进行了补充验证。
AI.motivation: 钴基蜂窝状量子磁体被认为是实现Kitaev自旋交换的潜在平台，此前Na₃Co₂SbO₆和Na₂Co₂TeO₆已被广泛研究，但Li₃Co₂SbO₆的磁性性质尚不明确，需要实验与理论结合来揭示其自旋模型归属。
AI.method: 采用非弹性中子散射实验测量Li₃Co₂SbO₆的磁激发谱，结合线性自旋波理论（LSWT）拟合扩展Kitaev-Heisenberg模型参数，并辅以磁场下的磁化测量和数值模拟进行交叉验证。
AI.result: Li₃Co₂SbO₆呈铁磁蜂巢面内排列，相邻面磁化方向相反（A型反铁磁序）。其磁激发谱能用扩展Kitaev-Heisenberg模型很好地描述，从而将其归类为Kitaev铁磁体（Kitaev A型反铁磁体）。
AI.conclusion: Li₃Co₂SbO₆是一个新的Kitaev铁磁候选材料，扩展了Kitaev自旋液体家族；其A型反铁磁序与面内铁磁耦合共存的结构特征为研究Kitaev物理提供了独特平台。

title: Atomic Structure of Amorphous Optical Coatings of TiO$_2$-doped GeO$_2$ by Grazing-Incidence Total X-ray Scattering Measurements
summary: Reducing coating thermal noise in future gravitational-wave detectors requires identifying the atomic motifs that control mechanical loss in amorphous optical coatings. We combine grazing-incidence X-ray pair distribution function measurements with atomic-structure modeling to study amorphous TiO$_2$-doped GeO$_2$ films over Ti cation concentrations from $\sim$11 % to $\sim$48 %, before and after annealing. The structural analysis reveals systematic composition- and annealing-dependent changes in short- and intermediate-range order. Increasing Ti content raises the average Ti coordination and promotes edge- and face-sharing polyhedral connections, while Ge remains predominantly fourfold coordinated. Annealing reduces these compact shared-polyhedron motifs and sharpens the first sharp diffraction peak, indicating a more relaxed intermediate-range network. Among the structural descriptors examined, the clearest correlation with the annealing-induced reduction in mechanical loss is the decrease in edge- and face-sharing polyhedra. These results connect composition, annealing, atomic structure, and mechanical dissipation in TiO$_2$-doped GeO$_2$, providing microscopic guidance for optimizing low-noise mirror coatings.

AI.tldr: 本文通过掠入射X射线对分布函数测量和原子结构建模，研究了TiO₂掺杂GeO₂非晶薄膜中Ti浓度和退火对原子结构的影响，发现边缘共享和面共享多面体的减少与机械损耗的降低密切相关，为优化低噪声镜面涂层提供了微观指导。
AI.motivation: 降低未来引力波探测器中涂层热噪声的需求，需要识别非晶光学涂层中控制机械损耗的原子构型。
AI.method: 结合掠入射X射线对分布函数测量与原子结构建模，对Ti阳离子浓度约11%至约48%的TiO₂掺杂GeO₂薄膜进行退火前后的结构分析。
AI.result: 增加Ti含量提高平均Ti配位数并促进边缘共享和面共享多面体连接，而Ge保持四重配位；退火减少这些紧凑共享多面体构型并使第一尖锐衍射峰变锐，表明中间范围网络更松弛；机械损耗的降低与边缘共享和面共享多面体的减少有最清晰的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了TiO₂掺杂GeO₂中成分、退火、原子结构与机械耗散之间的联系，为优化低噪声镜面涂层提供了微观指导。

title: Thermodynamic properties of chemically disordered compounds via AI-driven estimation of partition function with the PULSE method
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures, submitted to Physical Chemistry Chemical Physics
summary: In this article, we present an improved version of the PULSE method (Partition function Unsupervised Learning Sampling and Evaluation) for estimating the thermodynamic properties of chemically disordered compounds. The aim is to reduce the computational cost of Monte Carlo approaches for this type of material and to demonstrate that this generative tool can estimate thermodynamic properties by sampling and estimating the partition function of the system. To validate this innovative approach, we use the 2D Ising model as a benchmark. We demonstrate that our method accurately reproduces average properties with high precision and efficiency compared to traditional Monte Carlo sampling methods. Our results highlight the efficiency and adaptability of the PULSE method, making it a valuable tool for studying materials for which conventional methods are too inefficient to compute properties affected by chemical disorder at low cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进版PULSE方法，通过无监督学习采样和估计配分函数来高效计算化学无序化合物的热力学性质，在2D Ising模型中验证了其相比传统蒙特卡洛方法的高精度和低成本优势。
AI.motivation: 降低化学无序化合物热力学性质计算的蒙特卡洛方法计算成本，解决传统方法在低计算成本下效率低下的问题。
AI.method: 提出改进版PULSE方法（配分函数无监督学习采样与评估），通过生成式工具采样并估计系统配分函数来计算热力学性质。
AI.result: 在2D Ising模型基准测试中，该方法相比传统蒙特卡洛方法能以更高精度和效率准确再现平均性质。
AI.conclusion: PULSE方法高效且适应性强，为传统方法难以低成本处理的化学无序材料研究提供了有价值的工具。

title: Excited States from Restricted Open Shell Plane-Wave DFT
summary: Variational excited-state density functional theory (DFT) enables the calculation of excited states at a cost comparable to ground-state calculations, but single-configuration approaches often suffer from spin contamination. We implement restricted open-shell Kohn-Sham (ROKS) DFT, which recovers spin-pure singlet excitation energies via the variational minimization of a weighted combination of mixed-spin and triplet configurations, within the plane-wave projector augmented-wave framework of VASP. The energy functional is optimized using a preconditioned conjugate-gradient or a direct inversion in the iterative subspace algorithm, and analytical atomic forces are derived. The implementation is validated for eight organic molecules by comparison to the Q-Chem quantum chemistry code, yielding mean deviations of approximately $30$ eV. As a solid-state application, we investigate the three lowest lying excitations of MgO with a neutral oxygen vacancy. For a dielectric-dependent hybrid functional, vertical excitation energies from ROKS and time-dependent density functional theory (TDDFT) differ on average by about $0.21$ eV. The Franck-Condon shifts deviate on average by $0.14$ eV between the two methods and mass-weighted displacements between the excited states and the ground state by $0.12$ amu$^{1/2}$ Ang. Additional calculations at the PBE level reveal that these properties depend less strongly on the DFT functional for ROKS than for TDDFT. These results demonstrate that ROKS provides excitation energies and excited-state forces with an accuracy similar to TDDFT while retaining the favorable scaling of ground-state DFT, making it a promising approach for affordable excited-state simulations in extended systems.

AI.tldr: 本文在VASP的平面波投影缀加波框架下实现了限制性开壳层Kohn-Sham (ROKS) DFT，用于计算自旋纯态的单重态激发能。在8个有机分子上验证与Q-Chem代码平均偏差约30 meV；在MgO氧空位研究中，ROKS与TDDFT的垂直激发能平均偏差约0.21 eV，Franck-Condon位移约0.14 eV。结果表明ROKS在保持基态DFT可扩展性的同时，提供与TDDFT接近的精度。
AI.motivation: 变分激发态DFT能以基态计算成本处理激发态，但单组态方法常受自旋污染困扰。作者旨在解决这一问题，实现自旋纯的ROKS方法并扩展至固体体系。
AI.method: 在VASP中的PAW框架下实现ROKS，通过变分最小化混合自旋与三重态组态的加权组合恢复自旋纯态单重态激发能；使用预处理共轭梯度法或直接反演迭代子空间算法优化能量泛函；推导解析原子力。
AI.result: 有机分子验证中与Q-Chem平均偏差约30 meV；MgO氧空位中ROKS与TDDFT垂直激发能平均偏差0.21 eV，Franck-Condon位移0.14 eV，质量加权位移0.12 amu^{1/2}Å；PBE水平下ROKS对泛函依赖性低于TDDFT。
AI.conclusion: ROKS提供与TDDFT相似的激发能及激发态力的精度，同时保留基态DFT的优越可扩展性，是扩展体系中经济型激发态模拟的有前景方法。

title: Can MACE Potentials Accurately Describe Magnetism and Phase Stability in Fe-Ni Alloys? A Systematic Benchmark
summary: We present a systematic benchmark of MACE potentials for iron-nickel alloys, focusing on structural, elastic, magnetic, and finite-temperature properties relevant to phase stability. The reference dataset comprises spin-polarized PBE density functional theory (DFT) calculations for chemically disordered special quasirandom structures (SQS), spanning compositions, bcc and fcc crystal structures, and volumetric and shear deformations. A system-specific MACE-sqs model trained on this dataset achieves validation errors of 2.0 meV/atom for energies and 24.3 meV/Angstrom for forces. Compared with several MACE foundation models, including models trained with Hubbard U corrections, MACE-sqs gives the most consistent agreement with DFT and experiment for equations of state, equilibrium volumes, elastic constants, and thermal expansion trends in bcc and fcc Fe-Ni alloys. For the bcc-to-hcp transition, MACE-sqs predicts a pure-Fe transition pressure closer to experiment than the tested foundation models, but all models predict an incorrect increase of transition pressure with Ni content. This failure indicates that high-pressure magnetic collapse and composition-dependent magnetoelastic effects are not yet fully captured. Overall, targeted SQS-based training substantially improves the accuracy of MACE potentials for Fe-Ni alloys, while phase stability under magnetic collapse remains a key limitation for future model development.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了MACE势函数在铁镍合金中的表现，发现针对特定系统的SQS训练模型(MACE-sqs)在结构、弹性、磁性和有限温度性质上优于通用基础模型，但在高压磁塌缩下的相稳定性预测仍存在局限。
AI.motivation: 铁镍合金是地球内核的主要成分，其相稳定性研究对理解地球内部结构至关重要。现有机器学习势函数在合金体系中的泛化能力有限，需要系统评估和针对性改进。
AI.method: 构建基于PBE-DFT计算的自旋极化SQS数据集，训练系统特定的MACE-sqs模型；与多个MACE基础模型（包括带Hubbard U修正的版本）进行对比，评估状态方程、平衡体积、弹性常数和热膨胀等性质。
AI.result: MACE-sqs在能量误差2.0 meV/atom、力误差24.3 meV/Å；在bcc和fcc Fe-Ni合金中与DFT和实验最一致；但所有模型均错误预测bcc→hcp转变压力随Ni含量增加而上升。
AI.conclusion: 针对性SQS训练显著提升MACE势的精度，但高压磁塌缩和成分依赖的磁弹性效应仍是当前模型的关键瓶颈，需在未来发展中重点突破。

title: MATBG Josephson diode as an universal thermal machine
summary: Magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene Josephson junctions (MATBG-JJ) with a gate-tunable valley-polarized weak link exhibit an intrinsic Josephson diode effect originating from broken symmetries associated with valley polarization and band-structure anisotropy. Exploiting this nonreciprocal superconducting platform, we construct quantum Stirling (QSC), Otto (QOC), and Carnot (QCC) thermodynamic cycles, where the valley-polarization potential $Δ_v$ acts as the principal control parameter, in contrast to conventional Josephson thermal machines driven by superconducting phase bias. We systematically compare the performance of MATBG-based Josephson diode thermal machines (MATBG-JDTM) with MATBG-based Josephson junction thermal machines (MATBG-JJTM) and AA-stacked bilayer graphene Josephson junction thermal machines (AABLG-JJTM). Owing to the flat-band-enhanced density of states and electrically tunable nonreciprocal transport in MATBG, both MATBG-JDTM and MATBG-JJTM exhibit significantly enhanced work output and efficiency over a broad operating regime compared to AABLG-JJTM. In particular, the gate-controlled MATBG-JDTM provides a flux-free alternative to conventional phase-driven architectures, mitigating limitations associated with magnetic-flux control and flux-noise effects. Our results establish MATBG Josephson diode platforms as a promising route toward electrically tunable quantum thermal machines and nonreciprocal superconducting caloritronics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于魔角扭曲双层石墨烯约瑟夫森二极管（MATBG-JD）的量子热机，利用谷极化势作为调控参数构建斯特林、奥托和卡诺循环，相比传统结构在功输出和效率上显著提升，并提供了无磁通调控的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 传统约瑟夫森热机依赖超导相位偏置和磁通调控，存在磁通噪声和调控限制。本文利用MATBG约瑟夫森二极管的内禀非互易性，探索谷极化作为新的控制自由度，以构建更高效、电调谐的热力学循环。
AI.method: 构建三种量子热力学循环（QSC、QOC、QCC），以谷极化势Δ_v为控制参数。系统比较MATBG-JDTM（二极管热机）、MATBG-JJTM（结型热机）和AABLG-JJTM的性能，利用平带增强的态密度和电调谐非互易输运特性。
AI.result: MATBG-JDTM和MATBG-JJTM在功输出和效率上均显著优于AABLG-JJTM，覆盖较宽的工作区间。MATBG-JDTM提供无磁通调控方案，避免了磁通噪声等问题。
AI.conclusion: MATBG约瑟夫森二极管平台为实现电调谐量子热机和非互易超导量热电子学提供了有前景的途径。

title: Zero modes of non-abelian Dirac operator in topologically non-trivial band insulator
summary: We show that the local gauge-invariance of the quantum geometric tensor (QGT) defined in the Block-momentum space of a generic $N$-level (sublattice degrees of freedom) band insulator implies the existence of zero modes of non-abelian Dirac operator in such momentum space. Solutions of these zero modes equations in the two-dimensional Brillouin zone torus, in terms of Jacobi Theta function determine the probability amplitudes associated with the $N$-component ground state wave-function under adiabatic approximation in this Hilbert space. These solutions subjected to normalization, defines a complex projective ($CP$) space of $N-1$ dimension ($CP^{N-1}$ space) when one or more degeneracy points exist in the dispersion spectrum of such band-isulator. We show how the non-abelian generalization of the vortexability criterion of Chern bands automatically follows from these zero-mode equations, and also demonstrate their connection with momentum space-version of Lowest landau level algebra. Subsequently we write an Euclidean action from which these zero mode equations follow. We point out that the non-interacting part of different paradigms used to understand fractional Chern insulator(FCI) like phases in a host of two-dimensional material can be understood within this approach. We analyse two effective hamiltonian : lattice Dirac (QZW) model and two-band model for rhombohedral $N$-layer graphene in our propsoed framework and obtain important conclusions.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了能带绝缘体量子几何张量的局域规范不变性蕴含了非阿贝尔Dirac算子的零模，这些零模的解（用Jacobi Theta函数表示）决定了N分量基态波函数的概率幅，并自然导出了Chern能带的非阿贝尔涡旋判据及其与动量空间最低朗道能级代数的联系。
AI.motivation: 建立量子几何张量（QGT）的局域规范不变性与非阿贝尔Dirac算子零模之间的内在联系，为理解分数量子霍尔效应（FCI）相提供统一的几何框架。
AI.method: 利用Bloch动量空间的局域规范不变性推导非阿贝尔Dirac方程零模；用Jacobi Theta函数在二维布里渊区环面上求解；引入Euclidean作用量重构零模方程；将框架应用于晶格Dirac模型和菱面体N层石墨烯模型进行验证。
AI.result: 零模解归一化后定义了CP^{N-1}射影空间；自然导出了Chern能带的非阿贝尔涡旋判据；建立了与动量空间最低朗道能级代数的联系；在晶格Dirac和菱面体N层石墨烯模型中获得了重要结论。
AI.conclusion: 该几何框架统一了非相互作用部分的多种FCI范式，为理解二维材料中的拓扑物态提供了新的理论视角。

title: Atomic-Scale Observation of Symmetry Breaking in Altermagnetic MnTe
summary: The recent discovery of altermagnetism has sparked growing interest in compensated magnetic systems as promising platforms for highly scalable spintronics. Altermagnetism is a distinct magnetic order where opposite spin sublattices are connected by rotation, yielding zero net magnetization but momentum-dependent spin splitting. To date, experimental verification of altermagnetic order has been achieved predominantly through bulk-sensitive techniques, including spin-dependent electronic spectra and transport responses. However, direct atomic-scale evidence that explicitly correlates crystal symmetry, local structural distortions, and magnetic ordering has remained unexplored. Here, we report the direct atomic-scale observation of coexisting polar distortions and altermagnetic order in MnTe, combining atomic resolution scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) imaging with electron magnetic chiral dichroism (EMCD) measurements. We reveal that MnTe is not an ideal uniform P63/mmc g-wave altermagnet at the atomic scale. Instead, it hosts ubiquitous inversion-symmetry-breaking distortions that lower the spin-space-group (SSG) symmetry, admits d-wave altermagnetic components, and in lower-symmetry regimes, even allow s-wave spin splitting (net magnetization). The coexistence of ferroelectric signatures and altermagnetic order establishes local lattice symmetry in MnTe as a control knob for altermagnetic spin splitting, spin current generation, and multiferroic memory applications.

AI.tldr: 在MnTe中直接原子尺度观测到极性畸变与交变磁序共存，发现其并非理想均匀的g波交变磁体，而是存在反演对称性破缺畸变，可调控自旋分裂与多铁性应用。
AI.motivation: 此前交变磁序的实验验证主要依赖体相敏感技术（如自旋电子谱和输运测量），缺乏直接关联晶体对称性、局域结构畸变与磁有序的原子尺度证据。
AI.method: 结合原子分辨率扫描透射电子显微镜（STEM）成像与电子磁手性二色性（EMCD）测量，在MnTe中实现直接原子尺度观测。
AI.result: 发现MnTe在原子尺度上并非理想的均匀P63/mmc g波交变磁体，而是存在广泛的反演对称性破缺畸变，降低自旋空间群对称性，引入d波交变磁组分，并在低对称性条件下允许s波自旋分裂（净磁化）。
AI.conclusion: 铁电特征与交变磁序的共存表明局域晶格对称性可作为调控交变磁自旋分裂、自旋电流产生及多铁性存储应用的控制旋钮。

title: Formal O(N3)-Scaling Second-Order Perturbation Theory by Block Tensor Decomposition: Implementation on MP2 and rPT2
summary: Block tensor decomposition (BTD) and canonical polyadic decomposition (CPD) are combined into a unified $O(N^3)$-scaling framework for second-order perturbation theory (PT2), demonstrated on MP2 and renormalized PT2 (rPT2). BTD constructs the tensor hyper-contraction kernel at $O(N^3)$ via a dual-grid scheme; CPD factorizes the exchange channel through a block-based two-stage ALS. An asymmetric half-kernel design applies bare Coulomb to one vertex and coupling-constant-averaged screening to the other, capturing the SOSEX component of rPT2 without a frequency-dependent CPD. For MP2, BTD-CPD reproduces canonical RI-MP2 to 0.058~kcal/mol per heavy atom. For rPT2@PBE0 on the S66x8 benchmark, the mean absolute error is 0.36~kcal/mol (ME $-$0.19, RMSE 0.46) over 528 data points. The CPD-compressed intermediates yield $O(N^2)$ storage alongside $O(N^3)$ scaling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种将块张量分解（BTD）和规范多阶分解（CPD）统一到O(N³)框架中的二阶微扰理论（PT2）方法，在MP2和重整化PT2上验证，精度接近基准方法，存储降至O(N²)。
AI.motivation: 将BTD和CPD两种张量分解方法统一到一个计算框架中，实现二阶微扰理论（PT2）的高效计算，同时降低存储和计算复杂度。
AI.method: BTD通过双网格方案以O(N³)构建张量超收缩核；CPD通过基于块的两阶段交替最小二乘法（ALS）分解交换通道。采用不对称半核设计，一个顶点使用裸库仑相互作用，另一个顶点使用耦合常数平均的屏蔽相互作用，从而在不依赖频率相关CPD的情况下捕获rPT2的SOSEX分量。
AI.result: MP2中BTD-CPD再现规范RI-MP2，每重原子误差0.058 kcal/mol。rPT2@PBE0在S66x8基准测试中，528个数据点平均绝对误差0.36 kcal/mol（ME -0.19，RMSE 0.46）。CPD压缩的中间体实现O(N²)存储和O(N³)缩放。
AI.conclusion: BTD-CPD统一框架在保持O(N³)缩放的同时实现了O(N²)存储，在MP2和rPT2上均达到高精度，是一种高效的量子化学计算方法。

title: A supersymmetric study of charge and spin transport in Weyl semimetals under axionic electrodynamic response
summary: We investigate the charge and spin transport properties of a Weyl semimetal under an external magnetic field using a low-energy effective theory. By performing a chiral transformation, we remove the axial term from the fermionic Lagrangian, while its physical effects are retained through the system's electromagnetic response. This response, derived from integrating out the fermionic degrees of freedom, takes the form of axionic electrodynamics and enters the Dirac equation via minimal coupling. The resulting dynamics separate naturally into magnetic and electric components: the magnetic sector admits a supersymmetric factorization, while the electric part exhibits a PT-supersymmetric structure. Robin boundary conditions are applied to the spinor, setting the energy spectrum and defining exact spinor solutions. We obtain the chiral projections of probability and current densities, exhibiting a chiral imbalance in the material. We show that in the x-direction, only one chirality contributes to the chiral current ($j^x_l = 0$). Spin density and currents where also computed. Our results demonstrate how the interplay between axionic response and supersymmetry governs transport phenomena in our specific setup, offering novel insights into the effective field theory description of Weyl semimetals.

AI.tldr: 本文利用低能有效理论研究了外磁场下Weyl半金属的电荷与自旋输运性质，通过手征变换将轴子项从费米子拉格朗日量中移除，其物理效应通过轴子电动力学形式保留。研究揭示了磁性和电性分量分别具有超对称和PT超对称结构，并发现x方向仅有一种手征性对手征电流有贡献。
AI.motivation: 探究Weyl半金属在外磁场下的电荷与自旋输运特性，理解轴子响应与超对称性如何共同调控材料中的输运现象，为Weyl半金属的有效场论描述提供新见解。
AI.method: 采用低能有效理论，通过手征变换去除费米子拉格朗日量中的轴子项；将费米子自由度积分后得到轴子电动力学形式的电磁响应；对狄拉克方程应用Robin边界条件；将动力学分解为磁性和电性两部分，分别研究其超对称和PT超对称结构。
AI.result: 得到了手征投影的概率密度和电流密度，揭示了材料中的手征不平衡；发现x方向上仅有一种手征性对手征电流有贡献（j^x_l = 0）；还计算了自旋密度和自旋电流。
AI.conclusion: 轴子响应与超对称性之间的相互作用在特定设置下主导了输运现象，为Weyl半金属的有效场论描述提供了新见解。

title: Spontaneous breaking of non-invertible symmetries and duality to beyond-Landau transitions
summary: Spontaneous symmetry breaking is a well-understood mechanism for generating distinct phases of matter. Recently, the notion of symmetry has been broadened to include operations without inverses, leading to the concept of non-invertible symmetries. How do symmetry-breaking phases associated with non-invertible symmetries differ from those arising from conventional invertible symmetries? We address this question using concrete lattice models of the gapped phases with non-invertible Rep($H_8$) symmetry as an example. We find that, despite the symmetry being non-invertible, the symmetry-breaking phases can still be characterized by the long-range correlation of local order parameters, which obey a more general algebraic structure than in the invertible setting. Furthermore, via generalized gauging, certain non-invertible symmetry-breaking transitions can be mapped to deconfined quantum critical points of invertible symmetries, and vice versa. We establish precise conditions under which this duality holds and illustrate them with several families of examples, providing a systematic route to studying beyond-Landau phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文以Rep(H₈)对称性为例，研究非可逆对称性破缺相的特征，发现其仍可由长程关联的局域序参量刻画（满足更一般的代数结构），并通过广义规范映射建立了非可逆与可逆对称性之间的解禁量子临界点对偶，为超越朗道相变理论提供了系统方法。
AI.motivation: 非可逆对称性（无逆操作的对称性）是近年对称性概念的推广，但其破缺相与常规可逆对称性破缺相有何本质区别尚不清楚，作者希望通过具体格点模型回答这一基本问题。
AI.method: 以Rep(H₈)对称性的gapped相为具体模型，分析非可逆对称性破缺相的序参量长程关联行为；利用广义规范变换（generalized gauging）建立非可逆对称性破缺相变与可逆对称性解禁量子临界点（deconfined quantum critical points）之间的对偶关系。
AI.result: 非可逆对称性破缺相仍可由局域序参量的长程关联刻画，但序参量服从比可逆情形更一般的代数结构；通过广义规范，某些非可逆对称性破缺相变可映射为可逆对称性的解禁量子临界点，反之亦然，并给出了该对偶成立的精确条件。
AI.conclusion: 非可逆对称性破缺相并非全新的范式，而是在序参量代数结构上有所推广；建立的对偶关系为系统研究超越朗道理论的相变提供了新路径。

title: Relaxation-driven topological domains in moiré materials
summary: Spatial control of topology is highly desirable for realizing tunable quantum functionalities in materials. Moiré superlattices formed by twisting van der Waals heterostructures provide a natural platform for spatially modulated electronic phases, yet the emergence of tunable topological domains in these systems remains largely unexplored. Here we show that structural relaxation in twisted bilayer BiSb drives the formation of a distinct moiré topological phase, characterized by coexisting topologically nontrivial (Z$_2$ = 1) and trivial (Z$_2$ = 0) domains within a single moiré unit cell. As the twist angle is reduced, relaxation-induced modulation of the interlayer separation stabilizes an expanding network of topological regions embedded within trivial backgrounds of the moiré unit cell. The resulting internal domain boundaries host topologically-protected gapless 1D edge states that are directly visible in our simulated scanning-tunnelling microscopy maps.Furthermore, we demonstrate that the real-space topological domain structure and associated gapless edge states can be reversibly tuned by an out-of-plane electric field. Together, these results establish twisted BiSb as a promising platform for programmable topological domain patterning, where intrinsic networks of edge channels can be continuously tuned and electrically reconfigured in moiré materials.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了在扭曲双层BiSb中，结构弛豫驱动形成了一种独特的莫尔拓扑相，其单个莫尔原胞内共存拓扑非平凡（Z₂=1）和平凡（Z₂=0）的畴结构。随着扭转角减小，层间分离的弛豫诱导调制稳定了拓扑区域网络，畴边界处存在拓扑保护的1D边缘态，且可通过垂直电场可逆调控。
AI.motivation: 探索在莫尔超晶格中实现可调谐拓扑畴结构的可能性，解决当前对扭曲范德华异质结中拓扑域涌现机制认知不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过结构弛豫分析研究扭曲双层BiSb的莫尔超晶格，利用模拟扫描隧道显微镜（STM）观测拓扑域边界处的边缘态，并通过外加垂直电场调控拓扑畴结构。
AI.result: 发现扭曲双层BiSb莫尔原胞内出现Z₂=1和Z₂=0共存的拓扑畴，畴边界存在受拓扑保护的1D无隙边缘态，且该结构可被垂直电场可逆调谐。
AI.conclusion: 扭曲BiSb为可编程拓扑畴图案化提供了新平台，在莫尔材料中实现了边缘态通道网络的连续调谐与电学重构。

title: How reproducible are first-principles simulations of liquid water?
summary: Liquid water is fundamentally important, and its accurate computer simulation has been the driving force for myriad methodological developments. Ab initio molecular dynamics with forces obtained from density functional theory (DFT) is now a standard tool widely used by researchers. However, we reveal that previous studies of liquid water using the same widely-used density functional (revPBE-D3) exhibit significant discrepancies with one another, varying by over 20% in the diffusion coefficient and 10% in the density, raising fundamental questions about reproducibility. By combining modern long-range machine-learning interatomic potentials that enable robust statistical sampling with carefully converged DFT training data, we resolve these discrepancies, achieving consensus across six diverse community codes. Our predictions differ markedly from previous literature: we show that most previous results overestimate the density and underestimate the diffusion coefficient of revPBE-D3 water due to basis set incompleteness and pseudopotential inconsistencies, coupled with limitations in statistical sampling (in some cases). These benchmark values provide a reliable reference for validating current and future implementations of DFT-based ab initio molecular dynamics. Reaching agreement establishes confidence and credibility and serves as a prerequisite for the systematic assessment of new density functionals and numerical approximations.

AI.tldr: 通过结合长程机器学习势函数和精确收敛的DFT训练数据，解决了广泛使用的revPBE-D3密度泛函在液态水模拟中存在的显著偏差（扩散系数差异>20%，密度差异>10%），在六种不同社区代码间达成共识，发现以往研究因基组不完备、赝势不一致和统计采样不足而高估密度、低估扩散系数。
AI.motivation: 液态水的精确计算机模拟至关重要，但同一密度泛函（revPBE-D3）在不同研究中存在显著不一致（扩散系数差异>20%，密度差异>10%），严重影响了可重复性和可信度，亟需解决这些矛盾以建立可靠的基准。
AI.method: 使用现代长程机器学习原子间势能（MLIP）实现稳健的统计采样，结合精心收敛的DFT训练数据，在六种不同社区代码间进行交叉验证，解决基组不完备和赝势不一致等问题。
AI.result: 在六种不同社区代码间达成共识；发现以往研究大多高估密度、低估扩散系数；校正后的基准值与先前文献存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 这些基准值为验证当前和未来的基于DFT的从头算分子动力学实现提供了可靠参考，达成共识建立了信心和可信度，为系统评估新密度泛函和数值近似奠定了基础。

title: Spin-Hall-Like Magnon Transport in a Synthetic Antiferromagnetic Skyrmion Lattice
summary: We investigate spin-Hall-like magnon edge transport in a synthetic antiferromagnetic skyrmion lattice composed of two antiferromagnetically coupled skyrmion lattice layers with opposite magnetic textures. Based on a relaxed bilayer texture from micromagnetic simulations, we construct the bosonic Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian within linear spin-wave theory and calculate the bulk and strip magnon spectrum. We find counterpropagating in-gap edge modes with opposite layer polarization, whose layer-resolved propagation is further confirmed by dynamical micromagnetic simulations. A symmetry analysis shows that the fully coupled system lacks the pseudo-time-reversal symmetry required for a genuine bosonic Z2 topological phase. Thus, the observed edge modes are not Z2-protected helical magnon edge states, but layer-polarized, spin-Hall-like modes originating from the opposite Hall tendencies of the two skyrmion lattice layers. These results establish synthetic antiferromagnetic skyrmion lattices as a platform for spin-Hall-like magnon transport beyond a strict bosonic Z2 classification.

AI.tldr: 本文研究合成反铁磁斯格明子晶格中的类自旋霍尔效应磁振子边缘输运，发现层极化边缘模式并非Z2拓扑保护，而是源于两个斯格明子层相反霍尔趋势的类自旋霍尔效应模式。
AI.motivation: 探索合成反铁磁斯格明子晶格中磁振子边缘输运的物理机制，特别是验证是否存在真正的Z2拓扑保护螺旋边缘态。
AI.method: 使用微磁模拟获得弛豫双层结构，基于线性自旋波理论构建玻色子系统Bogoliubov-de Gennes哈密顿量，计算体态和带状磁振子能谱，并进行动力学微磁模拟验证层分辨传播特性。
AI.result: 发现具有相反层极化的反向传播能隙边缘模式；完整耦合系统缺乏赝时间反演对称性，因此观察到的边缘模式不是Z2保护的螺旋磁振子边缘态，而是层极化的类自旋霍尔效应模式。
AI.conclusion: 合成反铁磁斯格明子晶格可作为超越严格玻色子Z2分类的类自旋霍尔效应磁振子输运平台。

title: Chirality in Structural Phase Transitions
summary: Chirality, defined by the absence of mirror and inversion symmetries, has attracted considerable attention owing to its unique physical phenomena, including cross-correlated responses such as current-induced magnetization (CIM) and chiral phonons. Recently, it has been established that chirality is characterized by electric toroidal (ET) multipoles: the ET monopole $G_0$ in cubic systems and the ET quadrupole $G_u$ in noncubic systems. In this paper, we investigate achiral-to-chiral (AtC) structural phase transitions driven by atomic displacements and construct $G_{0,u}$ as explicit functions of the displacement order parameter $η$ based on a group-theoretical approach. We show that the leading-order dependence of $G_{0,u}(η)$ is determined by the symmetry of the parent structure and the character of the displacive mode, providing a symmetry-based classification of AtC transitions beyond a binary distinction between achiral and chiral phases. We also demonstrate that $G_{0,u}(η)$ is directly reflected in observable quantities such as CIM and CPS, both of which scale consistently with $G_{0,u}(η)$. We further clarify the microscopic mechanism by which AtC transitions give rise to chiral phonons and chiral phonon splitting (CPS) through the coupling between $G_{0,u}(η)$ and phonon degrees of freedom.

AI.tldr: 本文基于群论方法，建立了非手性到手性(AtC)结构相变中电环形(ET)多极子的显式函数形式，揭示了手性序参量η与可观测量(电流致磁化、手性声子分裂)之间的标度关系，并提出了超越二元手性分类的对称性分类方案。
AI.motivation: 手性体系(缺乏镜像和反演对称性)展现出独特的物理现象(如电流致磁化和手性声子)，但此前缺乏对非手性到手性(AtC)结构相变过程中手性序参量如何定量演化的系统理解。作者旨在构建ET多极子与位移序参量之间的显式函数关系，为AtC相变提供对称性分类框架。
AI.method: 采用群论方法，将ET单极子G₀(立方体系)和ET四极子G_u(非立方体系)构建为位移序参量η的显式函数；基于母体结构对称性和位移模式特征确定G_{0,u}(η)的领先阶依赖关系；通过耦合G_{0,u}(η)与声子自由度揭示手性声子产生的微观机制。
AI.result: (1) G_{0,u}(η)的领先阶依赖关系由母体结构对称性和位移模式特征唯一确定，提供了AtC相变的对称性分类；(2) 电流致磁化(CIM)和手性声子分裂(CPS)均与G_{0,u}(η)成标度关系，表明G_{0,u}(η)是可观测量的直接反映；(3) 阐明了AtC相变通过G_{0,u}(η)-声子耦合产生手性声子和CPS的微观机制。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了AtC相变中手性序参量的定量描述框架，将抽象的多极子理论与可观测物理效应(磁化、声子分裂)直接关联，为手性材料的设计和表征提供了理论基础和分类方案。

title: Magneto-Optical Detection of Anisotropic Spin Currents in Altermagnetic RuO2
summary: Altermagnets are a recently identified class of collinear antiferromagnets that host large spin-split electronic bands, offering a promising platform for efficient spin-current generation. Among proposed candidates, the metallic oxide RuO2 is predicted to exhibit strong altermagnetic spin splitting; however, whether it sustains robust magnetic order beyond the ultrathin thickness limit remains unresolved. Here, we employ optical probes to investigate charge-to-spin conversion in a 12-nm-thick (101)-oriented RuO2 film grown on sapphire. Polarization-resolved second-harmonic generation reveals nonlinear optical responses consistent with the surface symmetry and Néel order of RuO2. Under an applied current, both second-harmonic generation and polar magneto-optical Kerr effect measurements detect a pronounced, directionally anisotropic spin polarization, exhibiting enhanced signals for current along [010] and strongly suppressed responses for current along [-101], in agreement with the symmetry of the altermagnetic spin-splitter effect. Non-magnetic or Rashba-type mechanisms cannot explain this symmetry-selective response. Scanning transmission electron microscopy further reveals that substantial strain persists even in relatively thick films, providing a possible explanation for the observed behavior. Therefore, these results establish RuO2 as an efficient spin source and demonstrate the potential of altermagnets for field-free spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过光学探测证明了12纳米厚的(101)取向RuO2薄膜在室温下具有稳定的交变磁序和显著的电荷-自旋转换效率，应变是维持其磁有序的关键因素。
AI.motivation: RuO2被预测为强交变磁自旋劈裂材料，但能否在超薄厚度极限之外维持稳定的磁序尚未解决，亟需实验验证。
AI.method: 采用偏振分辨二次谐波产生、极磁光克尔效应以及扫描透射电子显微镜等光学和结构表征手段，对12纳米厚的(101)取向RuO2薄膜进行系统研究。
AI.result: 观测到与Néel序和表面对称性一致的非线性光学响应；在施加电流下检测到方向各向异性的自旋极化，沿[010]方向信号增强、沿[-101]方向受抑制，符合交变磁自旋劈裂效应的对称性；STEM揭示厚膜中仍存在显著应变。
AI.conclusion: RuO2是一种高效的自旋源，交变磁体可用于无场自旋电子学器件，应变是维持其磁有序的重要机制。

title: Quantum anomalous Hall effect in chiral semimetals
summary: The quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) effect is conventionally understood to exist only in Chern insulators, while a recent study has shown that ferromagnetic metals can also host the QAH effect. Between insulators and metals, we demonstrate that QAH can persist even in a chiral semimetal, where conduction and valence bands touch at zero energy. Transport calculations demonstrate that the Hall conductivity of such a system can be quantized in the presence of dephasing. Interestingly, its longitudinal conductivity remains finite and exhibits semimetallic behavior, in contrast to Chern insulators. This unusual transport behavior originates from the quantization of the Berry curvature integral over occupied states and the semimetallic band structure. This chiral semimetal can transition into a Chern insulator, accompanied by the vanishing of longitudinal conductivity and a reduction of the intrinsic length scale of the Hall response. Our results extend the concept of QAH and uncover the semimetallic QAH transport signatures.

AI.tldr: 本文证明手性半金属（一种导带和价带在零能接触的半金属）也能表现出量子反常霍尔（QAH）效应。在退相干存在时，霍尔电导可量化，而纵向电导保持有限并呈半金属特性，这与传统陈绝缘体不同。这种异常输运行为源于占据态贝里曲率积分的量子化与半金属能带结构。手性半金属可转变为陈绝缘体，伴随纵向电导消失和霍尔响应本征尺度减小。
AI.motivation: 传统认为QAH效应仅存在于陈绝缘体中，近期研究表明铁磁金属也可存在。作者想探索介于绝缘体与金属之间的半金属是否也能存在QAH效应，从而扩展对QAH效应的理解。
AI.method: 通过输运计算分析手性半金属在退相干条件下的霍尔电导和纵向电导，研究其贝里曲率积分量子化及能带结构特征，并与陈绝缘体对比。
AI.result: 手性半金属在退相干存在时实现了量子化的霍尔电导；其纵向电导保持有限且呈半金属行为，与陈绝缘体截然不同；该体系可转变为传统陈绝缘体，伴随纵向电导消失和霍尔响应本征尺度减小。
AI.conclusion: QAH效应不仅存在于绝缘体和金属中，还可存在于手性半金属中，从而扩展了QAH的概念。半金属QAH的独特输运特征为实验识别提供了新的判据。

title: Direction-selective intertwined charge, orbital, and lattice orders under uniaxial strain in hole-doped manganite: La0.75Ca0.25MnO3
summary: The complex interplay of charge, spin, orbital, and lattice degrees of freedom governs emergent phases in quantum materials, making strain a powerful control parameter. Recent advances in free-standing layer techniques have enabled extreme strains of nearly 8%, opening access to novel and often unexpected electronic and magnetic phases. Here, using a density functional theory approach, we investigate the effect of direction-selective uniaxial strain on the prototypical Jahn-Teller system La1-xCaxMnO3 (x = 0.25). We find that different strain directions stabilize qualitatively distinct structural, charge, and orbital responses, rather than merely different strengths of the same phase. In particular, extreme uniaxial strain selectively induces cooperative Jahn-Teller, breathing-like, and site-selective modulations, thereby enabling previously inaccessible intertwined orders in manganites. These results establish direction-selective uniaxial strain as a powerful and selective route for engineering emergent phases in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过密度泛函理论研究指出，方向选择性单轴应变能够对La1-xCaxMnO3 (x=0.25) 这一典型Jahn-Teller体系产生定性不同的结构、电荷和轨道响应，从而实现以往难以获得的锰氧化物交织有序相。
AI.motivation: 量子材料中电荷、自旋、轨道和晶格自由度之间的复杂相互作用决定了其涌现相，应变作为一种有效的调控手段备受关注。近年来自由站立薄膜技术使得近8%的极端应变成为可能，开辟了探索新型电子和磁相的新途径。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）方法，系统研究了方向选择性单轴应变对原型Jahn-Teller体系La1-xCaxMnO3 (x=0.25)的影响。
AI.result: 不同应变方向能够稳定定性不同的结构、电荷和轨道响应，而非仅仅是同一相的强度差异。极端单轴应变可选择性地诱导协同Jahn-Teller、类呼吸型和位点选择性调制，从而实现以往无法获得的锰氧化物交织有序相。
AI.conclusion: 方向选择性单轴应变是工程调控量子材料涌现相的一种强大且具有选择性的新途径。

title: Machine-learning-accelerated discovery of synthesizable high-temperature altermagnets with giant spin splitting
summary: Altermagnets offer a route to spin-polarized electronic states without macroscopic magnetization, because compensated magnetic order can generate momentum-dependent spin splitting through crystal-symmetry-controlled exchange fields. However, experimentally viable altermagnets combining large spin splitting, thermodynamic stability and high magnetic ordering temperatures remain scarce. Here, we develop a machine-learning-accelerated high-throughput framework to explore the tetragonal AB$_2$C$_2$D compounds. Screening 8640 variants identifies 1347 compensated antiferromagnetic candidates satisfying altermagnetic symmetry. An interpretable XGBoost model trained on first-principles spin-splitting data then isolates 34 low-hull-energy candidates,including four previously reported, with giant non-relativistic spin splittings exceeding 1.5 eV near the Fermi level. Detailed first-principles calculations of the representative RbMn$_2$Te$_2$O confirm a maximum spin splitting of $\sim$1.88 eV with dynamical stability and an estimated Néel temperature of $\sim$390 K. The giant splitting originates from symmetry-locked Mn-sublattice exchange fields amplified by directional Mn-d/Te-p hybridization. Furthermore, we uncover a profound soft-mode-driven structural transition associated with an interlayer dimensionality crossover in SrMn$_2$Te$_2$O, yet the unfolded electronic structure demonstrates that the altermagnetic spin splitting remains robust after lattice reconstruction. Hydrostatic pressure provides an additional tuning route, producing non-monotonic modulation of the spin-split Fermi surface governed by local coordination and orbital hybridization. These results establish tetragonal AB$_2$C$_2$D compounds as a tunable materials platform for stray-field-free spintronic devices and provide a general data-driven strategy for discovering robust giant-splitting altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机器学习加速的高通量筛选框架，在8640种四方AB₂C₂D化合物中发现34个具有巨大非相对论自旋分裂（>1.5 eV）的交替磁体候选材料，其中代表性材料RbMn₂Te₂O的自旋分裂达~1.88 eV，奈尔温度~390 K，并揭示了软模驱动的结构相变及压力调控机制。
AI.motivation: 现有交替磁体在同时具备大自旋分裂、热力学稳定性和高磁有序温度方面存在不足，亟需系统性的高效发现策略。
AI.method: 采用机器学习加速高通量框架：1) 筛选8640种四方AB₂C₂D化合物；2) 基于对称性筛选出1347种补偿反铁磁候选；3) 利用可解释XGBoost模型从第一性原理自旋分裂数据中识别出34个低凸包能候选材料；4) 对代表材料进行详细第一性原理计算验证。
AI.result: 发现34种低凸包能候选（含4种已知材料），自旋分裂>1.5 eV；RbMn₂Te₂O最大自旋分裂~1.88 eV，动态稳定，奈尔温度~390 K；揭示SrMn₂Te₂O中软模驱动的结构相变及层间维度交叉，但交替磁体自旋分裂保持稳健；发现压力可非单调调制自旋分裂费米面。
AI.conclusion: 建立四方AB₂C₂D化合物作为可调谐无杂散场自旋电子学材料平台，提出数据驱动的巨大自旋分裂交替磁体发现通用策略。

title: Taming quantum interference: a route to high electrical conductance in carbon nanotube assemblies
comment: 11 figures in main, 11 figures in SI; next magnetotransport manuscript after arXiv:2605.02295
summary: Miniaturized electronics require lightweight conductors that maintain high conductance under demanding conditions. CNT networks are promising candidates, but their transport is governed by inter-nanotube junctions where electron waves interfere. Controlling this interference requires understanding how junction architecture shapes transmission. We explore coherent transport through experimentally relevant junctions, from single and multiple single-walled CNT (SWCNT) contacts to double-walled CNT (DWCNT) and triple-walled CNT (TWCNT) junctions, with atomistic tight-binding non-equilibrium Green's-function calculations, also under a perpendicular magnetic field. We use analytically solvable minimal models to identify transport regimes expected for quasi-1D nanoscale junctions, and an electron-waveguide picture to interpret their CNT-specific manifestations. For single SWCNT--SWCNT junctions, high-transmission windows are set mainly by overlap length, doping and magnetic field. Gateway states can enhance conductance when some CNT subbands are gapped, and in some cases a magnetic field can restore transmission by lifting an interference blockade. In more complex architectures, added paths become selective: multi-junctions generate resonant filtering, while additional walls redistribute transmission instead of acting as independent channels. DWCNT junctions remain outer-wall dominated and SWCNT-like, whereas TWCNT junctions become genuinely multi-channel and more field-sensitive. This explains the lower, more field-sensitive conductance of multi-walled CNT (MWCNT) fibres, in accord with our ultrahigh-field measurements on SWCNT and MWCNT fibres. Ultimately, this work turns microscopic interference mechanisms into design principles for high-conductance, field-stable CNT conductors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过原子尺度计算和超强磁场实验，揭示了碳纳米管网络中从单壁到多壁结的量子干涉机制，并建立了高导电、抗磁场干扰的CNT导体设计原则。
AI.motivation: 微型化电子器件需要轻量、高导电的导体，但CNT网络的电子输运受到管间结的量子干涉控制。理解结的构型如何调控电子透射，对于设计高性能CNT导体至关重要。
AI.method: 采用原子级紧束缚非平衡格林函数方法，结合解析可解的最小模型和电子波导图像，对单壁、双壁、三壁CNT结的相干输运进行计算，并在超强磁场下进行实验验证。
AI.result: 单SWCNT结中高透射窗口由重叠长度、掺杂和磁场决定；网关态可增强带隙时的电导，磁场可解除干涉封锁；多结产生谐振滤波，双壁CNT仍由外层主导，三壁CNT变为多通道且更敏感于磁场；解释了MWCNT纤维电导更低且更受磁场影响的现象。
AI.conclusion: 将微观干涉机制转化为设计原则，为构建高导电、磁场稳定的CNT导体提供了理论指导。

title: Cascade of magnetic-field-induced quantum spin states in a spin-1 honeycomb magnet
summary: Quantum fluctuations endow spin systems with surprisingly enriched magnetic phase diagrams. In frustrated magnets, strong quantum fluctuations boosted by either geometrical incompatibility or competitive exchange interactions stabilize cascades of unusual phases of matter. Here we reveal the presence of multiple quantum phases in the honeycomb antiferromagnet Na$_{3}$Ni$_{2}$BiO$_{6}$, both inside and beyond its field-induced one-third magnetization plateau. Comprehensive measurements of thermodynamic quantities demonstrate that the one-third plateau comprises at least three distinct spin states with nearly-degenerate net magnetization, separated by first-order transitions that likely involve sequential spin reconfiguration. Upon further increasing the magnetic field, the system evolves across a myriad of peculiar phases before reaching full polarization; these intermediate phases possess copious low-energy excitations, manifested by anomalous upturns of specific heat at ultralow temperatures -- probably hinting at the development of "hidden" ordered ground states. The complex magnetic phase diagram of Na$_{3}$Ni$_{2}$BiO$_{6}$ underlines the preponderant impact of quantum fluctuations on a honeycomb spin lattice with strong exchange frustration.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过热力学测量揭示了蜂窝状反铁磁体Na₃Ni₂BiO₆中存在多个量子相，包括1/3磁化平台内的三个不同自旋态（由一级相变分隔）以及高场下的多个中间相，这些相在极低温下表现出反常比热上升，暗示存在“隐藏”有序基态，凸显了量子涨落在强阻挫蜂窝自旋晶格中的重要作用。
AI.motivation: 探究量子涨落如何在强阻挫蜂窝自旋体系中诱导出丰富的磁相图，特别是Na₃Ni₂BiO₆在1/3磁化平台内外的多量子相行为。
AI.method: 对Na₃Ni₂BiO₆单晶进行全面的热力学量（如比热、磁化率等）测量，分析其在磁场下的相变行为。
AI.result: 发现1/3磁化平台由至少三个净磁化近乎简并的不同自旋态组成，被一级相变分隔；高场下存在多个中间相，在极低温下比热出现反常上翘，表明存在丰富的低能激发和可能的“隐藏”有序基态。
AI.conclusion: Na₃Ni₂BiO₆的复杂磁相图凸显了量子涨落在具有强交换阻挫的蜂窝自旋晶格中的主导影响。

title: Effect of Vacancies on Hydrogen Mobility and Trapping in Elemental Fe and Cr: A DFT and kMC Study
summary: Hydrogen-vacancy interactions play an important role in governing hydrogen transport and embrittlement in body-centered cubic (BCC) metals. In this study, a multiscale approach combining density functional theory (DFT) and kinetic Monte Carlo (kMC) simulations is employed to investigate hydrogen behavior in BCC Fe and Cr. The DFT-calculated binding energies and Bader charge analysis indicate stronger hydrogen trapping in Cr than in Fe. Migration and detrapping energy barriers are determined using the climbing-image nudged elastic band method, showing that the detrapping energy generally decreases with increasing hydrogen occupancy. However, the sixth hydrogen atom in Fe exhibits a finite barrier, contrary to some previous reports. kMC simulations are then used to evaluate hydrogen diffusion over extended time and length scales. The results demonstrate that vacancy defects significantly reduce hydrogen mobility and increase the effective activation energy, with a more pronounced effect observed in Cr due to stronger trapping. The combined DFT-kMC framework provides detailed insight into the mechanisms of hydrogen trapping, detrapping, and diffusion in BCC metals, offering important implications for understanding hydrogen embrittlement in structural materials.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过DFT与kMC多尺度方法，系统揭示了BCC Fe和Cr中氢-空位相互作用机制，发现Cr对氢的捕获更强，空位缺陷显著降低氢迁移率，为理解氢脆提供了重要见解。
AI.motivation: 氢-空位相互作用对BCC金属中的氢传输和氢脆行为至关重要，但对其微观机理的理解仍不充分，尤其缺乏Fe与Cr的系统对比。
AI.method: 采用DFT计算结合能、Bader电荷分析及CI-NEB方法确定迁移和脱陷能垒，再通过kMC模拟评估长时间尺度下的氢扩散行为。
AI.result: Cr对氢的捕获强于Fe；脱陷能垒随氢占据数增加而降低，但Fe第六个氢原子存在有限能垒；空位缺陷显著降低氢迁移率并增加有效活化能，Cr中效应更明显。
AI.conclusion: DFT-kMC框架成功揭示了BCC金属中氢捕获、脱陷和扩散机制，为理解结构材料的氢脆提供了重要理论依据。

title: Photon-energy-programmable subnanometric electron birth-site control
summary: Optical control of electron-generation sites has broadly enabled ultrafast nanoscale imaging, spectroscopy, and functional control. Existing approaches achieve nanoscale site selectivity by shaping localised optical fields around nanostructures, thereby limiting independent site selectivity within the same local-field hotspot. Here, using a single-molecule electron emitter, we show that site selectivity can instead be encoded in the electronic excitation pathway, enabling subnanometric control of electron birth sites within the same local-field hotspot. By tuning the photon energy, we selectively access molecular states of different spatial symmetry and reversibly switch the electron birth site between distinct locations in the same emitter, with the change read out directly in the far-field emission pattern. The switching depends on photon energy alone and is absent under variations in intensity or polarisation. Our results establish optical birth-site selectivity that is not dictated by the local-field distribution, opening a route to electron birth-site control through the electronic excitation pathway.

AI.tldr: 本文通过单分子电子发射器，利用电子激发路径而非局域光场分布，实现了在同一局域场热点内亚纳米级电子出生位点的可逆光控切换，仅依赖于光子能量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖纳米结构塑造局域光场来实现位点选择，但无法在同一局域场热点内进行独立位点选择性控制。作者希望突破这一限制，探索基于电子激发路径的位点选择性新机制。
AI.method: 使用单分子电子发射器，通过调节光子能量选择性地激发不同空间对称性的分子态，从而在同一发射器内可逆切换电子出生位点，并通过远场发射图案直接读出变化。
AI.result: 实现了仅依赖光子能量（而非光强或偏振）的电子出生位点可逆切换，切换结果可直接在远场发射图案中观察。
AI.conclusion: 建立了不受局域场分布驱动的光学出生位点选择性，开辟了通过电子激发路径控制电子出生位点的新途径。

title: Zero-Field Thermal Hall Effect in Insulator
summary: Fourier's law dictates that heat flow is usually parallel to the applied temperature gradient. However, under a high magnetic field, heat flow carried by both electrons in conductors and phonons in insulators can be deflected, a phenomenon known as thermal Hall effect. Intriguingly, we observe at zero field a spontaneous thermal Hall effect in an antiferromagnetic insulator. Despite a vanishingly small uncompensated magnetization, the magnitude of this effect is surprisingly large, comparable to typical responses induced by several teslas of external field. This zero-field behavior indicates that charge-neutral heat carriers can be governed by an intrinsic effective field arising from the unique spin arrangement. Our discovery challenges the centuries-old preconception of heat conduction and open up new avenues for exploring non-trivial topological responses in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文在反铁磁绝缘体中发现了零磁场下的自发热霍尔效应，其大小堪比外加几特斯拉磁场下的效应，挑战了传统热传导观念，揭示了自旋排列产生的内在有效场对热载流子的调控作用。
AI.motivation: 探索在没有外加磁场的情况下，热流是否会被自旋结构产生的内禀有效场偏转，挑战傅里叶定律的传统认知。
AI.method: 在反铁磁绝缘体中进行零磁场热霍尔效应测量，观测热流的自发偏转行为，并与外加磁场下的效应进行对比。
AI.result: 观测到零磁场下显著的自发热霍尔效应，其强度与几特斯拉外场诱导的效应相当；材料中未补偿磁化强度极小。
AI.conclusion: 电荷中性的热载流子（声子）可被自旋排列产生的内禀有效场偏转，挑战了热传导的经典理解，为探索量子材料中的拓扑响应开辟了新方向。

title: Analytical solution of the Langmuir model for moisture diffusion in cylindrical coordinates
summary: Moisture diffusion in polymers and bio-based materials frequently exhibits non-Fickian behavior that cannot be described by classical diffusion models. The Langmuir model, which accounts for the coexistence of mobile and bound water molecules, has been widely used to represent such phenomena. However, analytical solutions of this model are generally limited to planar geometries, while cylindrical systems are typically investigated using numerical methods. In this work, the Langmuir diffusion model is solved analytically in cylindrical coordinates. The resulting solution provides both the local evolution of moisture content within the cylinder and the corresponding global moisture uptake kinetics. The analytical solution is validated through comparison with an independent numerical solution based on a finite difference scheme, showing excellent agreement for both the global absorption kinetics and the radial moisture profiles. The proposed formulation therefore provides a simple and efficient analytical framework for studying non-Fickian moisture diffusion in cylindrical systems such as natural fibers, and facilitates the identification of model parameters from experimental data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了朗缪尔扩散模型在柱坐标下的解析解，用于描述非菲克型水分扩散行为，并通过数值方法验证了其准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有朗缪尔模型解析解局限于平面几何，而圆柱体系（如天然纤维）中水分扩散的非菲克行为通常只能依赖数值方法求解，缺乏简洁高效的解析框架。
AI.method: 在柱坐标系下对朗缪尔扩散模型进行解析求解，得到圆柱体内局部水分含量的时空演化及整体吸湿动力学表达式，并通过有限差分数值解进行对比验证。
AI.result: 解析解与有限差分数值解在全局吸收动力学和径向水分分布上均吻合良好，验证了公式的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该解析公式为研究圆柱体系（如天然纤维）中的非菲克水分扩散提供了简单高效的分析工具，并有助于从实验数据中识别模型参数。

title: Nanoscale Confinement Enhances Ultrafast Demagnetization
summary: Nanoscale miniaturization has revolutionized the field of spintronics by enabling exponential growth in areal bit density. A similar leap is also expected in device speeds through successfully harnessing femtosecond magnetization dynamics. However, combining this with the miniaturization of realistic devices is challenging. To address this, we studied the effect of dimensional confinement on the femtosecond demagnetization of Fe. By gradually increasing the level of confinement while keeping excitation conditions constant, we found that Fe layers thinner than 10 nm exhibit enlarged demagnetization amplitudes, reaching a $\sim75\%$ increase at 2 nm. By combining ultrafast experiments sensitive to the spins, the charge carriers, and the phonons, we establish that this finite$\text{-}$size effect is magnetic in origin and is not phonon$\text{-}$driven. With the support of ab$\text{-}$initio calculations and atomistic spin dynamics simulations, we identify the enhancement effect as due to local weakening of spin order at the Fe$\text{'}$s interface, which becomes significant upon increased confinement.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现在Fe薄膜厚度低于10纳米时，飞秒退磁幅度显著增大（2纳米时增加约75%），并通过超快实验和第一性原理计算证明这一有限尺寸效应源于磁性界面自旋序的局域弱化，而非声子驱动。
AI.motivation: 自旋电子学中，纳米尺度小型化已使面密度指数增长，但实现飞秒磁化动力学与器件小型化的结合是当前挑战，亟需研究尺寸限制对超快退磁的影响。
AI.method: 通过逐步增加Fe薄膜的维度限制（保持激发条件恒定），结合对自旋、载流子和声子敏感的超快实验，以及第一性原理计算和原子自旋动力学模拟。
AI.result: 发现厚度低于10 nm的Fe层退磁幅度增大，2 nm时增加约75%；该效应为磁性起源，非声子驱动；机制是界面处自旋序的局域弱化在强限制下变得显著。
AI.conclusion: 维度限制可显著增强飞秒退磁幅度，这一有限尺寸效应为磁性起源，源于界面自旋序弱化，这对设计超快自旋电子器件具有重要指导意义。

title: Change in charge density wave order beyond the Lifshitz transition in 2H-Ta\textsubscript{1$\pmδ$}S\textsubscript{2}
summary: We investigate electronic instabilities in 2H-TaS\textsubscript{2} and a self-intercalated variant, 2H$^\dagger$-Ta\textsubscript{1+$δ$}S\textsubscript{2}. In conventional samples, which we determine to be slightly hole-doped, spectral gaps and backfolded features are found as fingerprints of the $3\times3$ charge density wave (CDW). Notably, the backfolded features emerge only at a temperatures below $T\approx$~65~K, substantially lower than the established CDW temperature of 78~K, suggesting an incommensurate-commensurate lock-in transition analogous to the phenomenology of the 2H-TaSe\textsubscript{2}. In contrast, the self-intercalated 2H$^\dagger$ sample exhibits substantial electron doping and signatures of a novel \tworootthree CDW. Using \textit{ab initio} calculations of the phonon spectrum, we demonstrate that the \threebythree instability ($\mathbf{q}=\sfrac{2}{3}\mathbf{ΓM}$) is highly sensitive to band filling. Furthermore, with increased interlayer spacing, a competing soft phonon mode emerges near $\mathbf{q}=\sfrac{1}{2}\mathbf{ΓK}$, corresponding to the superstructure observed in the 2H$^\dagger$ phase, although in our calculations this instability arises under hole doping rather than the electron doping inferred experimentally. These results establish band filling and interlayer spacing as key control parameters for CDW ordering vectors in 2H-TaS\textsubscript{2}, and highlight a route to engineering electronic instabilities in a prototypical layered material.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了2H-TaS₂及其自插层变体2H$^\dagger$-Ta$_{1+δ}$S₂中的电子不稳定性。发现传统样品存在轻微空穴掺杂，其3×3电荷密度波(CDW)的背折叠特征仅在约65 K以下出现，低于公认的78 K CDW转变温度，暗示存在非公度-公度锁定转变。自插层样品则显示电子掺杂和新型√3×√3 CDW特征。第一性原理计算表明，3×3不稳定性对能带填充高度敏感，且层间距增大时会竞争出现q=½ΓK的软声子模。这些结果确立了能带填充和层间距是CDW序矢的关键调控参数。
AI.motivation: 探究2H-TaS₂及其自插层变体中的电子不稳定性，揭示能带填充和层间距对电荷密度波(CDW)序矢的调控作用，为工程化调控层状材料中的电子不稳定性提供路线。
AI.method: 采用角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)等实验手段表征电子结构，结合第一性原理（ab initio）计算声子谱，分析不同掺杂和层间距下的晶格不稳定性。
AI.result: 1) 传统2H-TaS₂为轻微空穴掺杂，CDW背折叠特征出现在~65 K以下（低于公认的78 K），暗示非公度-公度锁定转变；2) 自插层2H$^\dagger$样品呈现显著电子掺杂和新型√3×√3 CDW；3) 计算表明3×3不稳定性(q=⅔ΓM)对能带填充敏感，层间距增大时出现竞争性q=½ΓK软声子模。
AI.conclusion: 能带填充和层间距是2H-TaS₂中CDW序矢的关键控制参数，可通过插层等手段工程化调控电子不稳定性，为设计新型电荷有序态提供新思路。

title: Search for high-pressure phases of yttrium via a data assimilation approach
summary: We investigate the distorted face-centered-cubic (dfcc) phase of yttrium (Y) using a data-assimilation-based structure search that combines high-resolution powder x-ray diffraction (XRD) data with machine-learning interatomic potentials. By exploring supercells containing up to 128 atoms, we identify three low-enthalpy phases: the previously reported $I4_1/a$ structure and two additional structures, $Ibam$ and $R\overline{3}$. No data-assimilation-derived structure relaxes to the previously proposed $R\overline{3}m$ phase. Phonon calculations show that $I4_1/a$, $Ibam$, and $R\overline{3}$ are dynamically stable, whereas $R\overline{3}m$ exhibits imaginary modes near the $Γ$ point, indicating dynamical instability. Enthalpy calculations using both PBE and r$^{2}$SCAN place the four candidate structures within about 10 meV/atom, indicating a complex energy landscape with multiple competing minima, although $R\overline{3}m$ is consistently highest in enthalpy and r$^{2}$SCAN favors $I4_1/a$ throughout the dfcc pressure range. Rietveld refinements of the powder XRD profile at 60 GPa further narrow the viable structural models to $I4_1/a$ and $Ibam$, both of which reproduce the experimental data better than $R\overline{3}m$ and $R\overline{3}$. Taken together with the energetic ordering and dynamical stability, these results identify $I4_1/a$ as the most plausible structure of the dfcc phase of Y, with $Ibam$ remaining a close competing candidate, particularly toward the high-pressure side of the dfcc region.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过数据同化结构搜索方法，结合高分辨率粉末X射线衍射数据和机器学习势函数，发现钇(Y)的扭曲面心立方(dfcc)相中，除已知的I4₁/a结构外，还存在Ibam和R\overline{3}两种新结构。通过声子计算、焓值计算和Rietveld精修分析，最终确定I4₁/a为dfcc相最可能的结构，Ibam为次优候选。
AI.motivation: 旨在澄清钇(Y)在高压下扭曲面心立方(dfcc)相的真实晶体结构，特别是验证此前提出的R\overline{3}m结构是否正确。
AI.method: 采用数据同化结构搜索方法，结合高分辨率粉末X射线衍射数据和机器学习原子间势函数，在包含最多128个原子的超胞中进行结构搜索。通过声子色散计算、PBE和r²SCAN泛函的焓值计算，以及Rietveld精修进行结构验证。
AI.result: 识别出三种低焓相：I4₁/a、Ibam和R\overline{3}；未得到R\overline{3}m相。声子计算显示前三种结构动态稳定，而R\overline{3}m在Γ点附近存在虚频。四种候选结构焓值相差约10 meV/atom，R\overline{3}m焓值最高。Rietveld精修显示I4₁/a和Ibam与实验数据吻合更好。
AI.conclusion: I4₁/a是Y的dfcc相最合理的结构，Ibam在高压侧为有力竞争者，而此前提出的R\overline{3}m结构因动态不稳定和焓值最高被排除。

title: Unity-order coupling between free electrons and multiphoton waveguided Fock states
